hero.subtitle: Native performance, minimal latency and immaculate DX. Built in Go for devs who ship the whole stack — from the database to the pixel.
hero.platforms: macOS · Linux · Windows · ARM and x86_64

0.title: Cold start in 142ms
0.text: Core written in Go. Native rendering, incremental indexing and zero Electron overhead — opens huge projects without choking.

1.title: Shortcuts forged for flow
1.text: Command Center, smart multi-cursor and cross-stack Go-to-Definition — TypeScript, Go, Rust or SQL in a single session.

2.title: Frontend and backend, side by side
2.text: Bundled LSPs, integrated terminal, git/GitHub and file watcher — your entire stack without installing twelve extensions in week one.

features.subtitle: LSP, terminal, git and search are tuned out of the box. Open the project and start — no plugin hunting, no configuring three different paths for the same formatter.

row1.text: LSPs managed by Adila, with hot-reload on schema changes. TypeScript, Go, Rust, Python and SQL talk to each other — Go-to-Definition crosses the stack.

row2.title2: git that stays out of the way.
row2.text: Multiple shell sessions with prompt integration, inline git status and signed commits without leaving the editor. Push, PR and review in three keystrokes.

powerFeatures.subtitle: Every Adila feature solves a concrete pain for engineers maintaining an entire stack in production.

0.title: Command Center
0.text: A single shortcut for files, symbols, commands and git history. Fuzzy ranking trained on how you actually use it.

1.title: Managed LSP
1.text: Servers installed on demand. Background updates — no terminal required.

2.title: Git and GitHub
2.text: Inline diff, blame, integrated PRs and reviews. Guided stash and cherry-pick with a history you can actually read.

3.title: Multi-shell terminal
3.text: bash, zsh, fish or pwsh with prompt integration and native split panes. Sub-8ms key latency.

performance.title: Speed isn't a detail.
performance.subtitle: Adila is measured and re-measured on every release. These are real numbers — not marketing estimates.

cta.subtitle: Public beta. Free while it lasts. Your configs travel with your account.
cta.heading: Download Adila
cta.text: A single binary. We auto-detect your platform on the next screen.

footer.tagline: Adila is a native code editor built in Go. Performance, DX and fullstack — no compromises.
